props.name: children
props.description: The contents of the card. Provide either `Card.*` subcomponents (for example `Card.Heading`, `Card.Description`, `Card.Metadata`) or any custom content. A card with no children will not render.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name(s) for custom styling.

props.name: padding
props.description: Controls the internal padding of the Card.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Controls the border radius of the Card.

props.name: as
props.description: The HTML element to render. Use `'section'` for **standalone** Cards (not inside a list of cards) so screen readers announce the Card as a labelled region. When `Card.Heading` is present, `aria-labelledby` is automatically wired. Use the default `'div'` when the Card is inside an `<li>` of a list of cards.

props.name: icon
props.description: An Octicon or custom SVG icon to render.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the icon. When omitted, the icon is treated as decorative.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for accessibility. Defaults to empty string (decorative).

props.name: as
props.description: The heading level to render. When the parent Card uses `as="section"`, the heading's `id` is automatically wired to the section's `aria-labelledby`.

props.name: children
props.description:
The descriptive text for the card. Rendered inside a `

` element so should be flowing text content.

props.name: children
props.description: Interactive control for the top-right corner of the card.

props.name: children
props.description: Metadata content for the bottom of the card. Accepts any content: plain text, icons, or other Primer components.
